summary: Frontend-only RETEST of yield-banner fix for 'دجاج فاهيتا (عرض)' (fahita-view). Confirmed the duplicate inline yield calc at line ~3435 is now properly gated with !usesPieceDefYield. Yield banner now displays '3.750 حصة' as expected. Cost box shows 1,856 IQD total and 495 IQD per حصة. Regression check: other product cards (لحم برغر, كراة مشروم) render correctly without errors.

fahita_yield_banner.actual: 📐 العائد المحسوب من الوصفة: 3.750 حصة وزن القطعة 1 حصة = 80 غرام · إجمالي الوصفة 300 غرام

critical_code_review_comments: Note: Console showed 403 errors on /api/branches calls during navigation - unrelated to manufacturing tab/yield logic, but worth investigating tenant/permission handling for branches endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Yield-banner fix for fahita-view is VERIFIED working. The !usesPieceDefYield gate on the duplicate inline calc (line ~3435 in WarehouseManufacturing.js) correctly prevents the divide-by-mainUnitFactor when piece_def_value is used as yield source. Banner shows 3.750 حصة, cost 1856/495 IQD as expected. Other products unaffected.
rca_of_the_issue: Previously, a duplicate inline yield calculation at WarehouseManufacturing.js line ~3435 was computing totalGrams/mainUnitFactor without gating, overriding the piece_def-based yield (3.750) with 300 (raw grams). Fix gates this with usesPieceDefYield flag matching computeCostBreakdown logic. Verified: yield-banner now reads '3.750 حصة'.
